note: AUD5 fix for finding F-18 (docs/flowmap/audit/04-findings.md) — the register's last row. SCOPE: .mjs TOOLING — real verification is node --test tools/flowmap/waves.test.mjs (the --strict test failed pre-fix).

intent.problem: AUD3: waves.mjs reports dependency cycles as data but always exits 0 — a caller reading only the exit code proceeds on a cyclic plan.
intent.approach: exit-0-by-design is now documented prominently in the header; new --strict exits 1 when the plan has >= 1 cycle (verify-change --strict precedent); the JSON report still carries the cyclic ids; the human CYCLE line states how to make it blocking.
intent.rationale: the register offered document-or-strict; both together cost one flag and keep every existing caller (orchestrate consumes the JSON, not the exit) unchanged.
